_doc: CPM60.COM = component sources (99%, see build_cpm60.LAYOUT) + these 125 COM-specific bytes (1%). They have no relocated-source form: the installer ships them and the 6502 boot loader rewrites them during relocation. build_cpm60_com() applies them after placing the component slices.

ranges.0x0260: region boundary byte between the installer driver and the zero pad
ranges.0x0A00-0x0A0D: 14-byte COM-specific Language-Card bank / handoff glue prologue that precedes the $1000 relocator
ranges.0x0A69: boot-loader reloc byte rewritten at runtime
ranges.0x0B76: boot-loader reloc byte rewritten at runtime
ranges.0x0D80-0x0DFF: UNRELOCATED InstallFragments template (BIOS patch table, aux keymap, CPU-switch handoff glue): the COM holds STA $FFFF placeholders the boot loader rewrites to STA $C700; os/CPM_InstallFragments.s is the relocated form
ranges.0x165C-0x1663: CCP install-time data cells (sysgen pointers), zero/unset in the shipped template; os/CPM_CCP.asm holds the booted values
